name: Zuleika Gold Limited
summary: Zuleika Gold Limited engages in the exploration and development of gold properties in Australia. Its flagship project is the Zuleika gold project that covers an area of 230 sq km located to the north west of Kalgoorlie. The company also holds interest in the Credo, Goongarrie, Menzies, Ruby Plains, and K2 gold mine projects. The company was formerly known as Dampier Gold Limited and changed its name to Zuleika Gold Limited in February 2021. Zuleika Gold Limited was founded in 2010 and is based in Twin Waters, Australia.
